tests.name: Grid Layout Verification
tests.details: Generated code uses grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 for features, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 for pricing, multi-column grid for testimonials.

tests.name: Image Pipeline SSE + Persistence
tests.details: SSE generated_images_map event wired end-to-end through Dashboard->RightPanel->PreviewTab. _assets/ file saving added in file-operations.js for persistence across reloads.

tests.name: Preview Rendering
tests.details: Preview renders correctly with glassmorphism navbar, gradient text, CTA buttons. No JS errors.

tests.name: Server Health
tests.details: Next.js API returning 200 OK. No compilation errors from modified files.

summary: P0 Image Pipeline and P1 Grid Layout fixes implemented and verified. New builds will have persistent image rendering via _assets/ files + live SSE mapping.
